rationale: Hard pass. The Dragon Ball Z anime hook is wildly off-DNA for a calm pastel sorting puzzle aimed at women 25-55 — the saturated blue/gold action palette, male shonen IP character, and high-aggression "charging Kamehameha" energy clash with the soft lavender, character-free, satisfying-ASMR tone of Marble Sort. There's also zero mechanical bridge to color sorting or conveyor physics, plus obvious IP/trademark risk using Goku. Skip this archetype entirely; if you want to borrow the "charging energy" curiosity beat, restage it as a glowing marble building up before a satisfying multi-color sort cascade.
